title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 51.
content:
There was an Old Person of Rhodes,
    Who strongly objected to toads;
    He paid several cousins,
    To catch them by dozens,
    That futile Old Person of Rhodes.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 51."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
